---
id: getpolicy
title: "Gets specified policy"
description: "Fetches the specified policy version, or the latest if no version is provided."
sidebar_label: "Gets specified policy"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: api/client-api/governance/glean-api-governance
custom_edit_url: null
---

  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Gets specified policy"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/rest/api/v1/governance/data/policies/{id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>

Fetches the specified policy version, or the latest if no version is provided.
